challenges.title: Hello and print: Core
challenges.description: Practice the core idea of hello and print in a focused exercise that emphasizes correctness and readability. Your task is to print output to the console.
challenges.hint: Use print() with a string. Start with the simplest working version before adding extras.

steps.title: Understand the task
steps.explanation: Practice the core idea of hello and print in a focused exercise that emphasizes correctness and readability. Your task is to print output to the console.

steps.title: Implement the solution
steps.explanation: Use Python syntax and built-ins that fit the challenge "Hello and print: Core 1".

steps.title: Verify the result
steps.explanation: Run the code with a simple example and check that the output matches the goal.
